rationale: The only change was employer names (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective to Naver/Tencent/MercadoLibre), yet neither evaluation references any company name in its reasoning. The two write-ups reach essentially the same conclusion — strong broad experience, relevant recent AI-agent work, but a seniority mismatch and no evidence of strategic/customer-facing leadership. The 1-point score difference (4 vs 5) and the reworded justifications fall within ordinary run-to-run variation, and no concern or reasoning keys off the changed employers.
